items.title: Book Riot’s Deals of the Day for February 9, 2026
items.description: A graveyard full of secrets, a vampire story, an unconventional snake-handler, and more of today's best book deals.

items.title: Read Harder This Black History Month
items.description: These seven books by Black authors complete the first seven tasks of the 2026 Read Harder Challenge, from microhistories to gothic novels.

items.title: Eight Twisted Noir Superhero Stories
items.description: These eight great noir superhero stories are full of crime, revenge, and awesome superheroes, from classic comics to modern day graphic novels.

items.title: About that New Michael Connelly Podcast
items.description: The Audies and Edgar Allen Poe Award finalists have been announced, plus adaptation news, and more

items.title: 16 of the Best New Romances by Black Authors
items.description: A bounty of new and recent Black romances await you, including a golf romance, enemies to lovers stories, great romantasy, and more.
